hero.title: World Cup predictions feel better when
hero.subtitle: WorldPredict keeps the tournament focused on quick match picks, private groups, and live rankings that make every confirmed World Cup result matter.

aside.noUpcomingMatches: The backend has not published upcoming matches yet.
aside.signInPrompt: Sign in to save predictions, join private groups, and follow the ranking as results are confirmed.

title.makeEveryWorldCup: Make every World Cup fixture count.

subtitle.expandOneMatch: Expand one match at a time, save exact scores, and keep your tournament picks easy to scan.

errorMessages.invalidInput: Enter whole numbers between 0 and 20 for both scores.
errorMessages.matchClosed: This match is no longer open for predictions.
errorMessages.matchNotFound: We could not find that match. Refresh and try again.
errorMessages.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again to save predictions.
errorMessages.updateFailed: We could not save your prediction right now. Try again.

profileIncomplete.title: Complete your profile to submit predictions.
profileIncomplete.body: Country and favorite team are required before we unlock the form.

groupSection.shareCode: Share this code with friends so they can join this group:

rankingSection.seeHowYourPoints: See how your points compare across all players, beyond your private groups.
rankingSection.yourPlaceInGlobalBoard: Your place in the global board
rankingSection.scoreFirstPrediction: Score your first matched prediction to appear in the ranking.
rankingSection.completeProfileAndScore: Complete your profile and score a match to join the ranking.
rankingSection.noGlobalRankingYet: No global ranking yet. Once scored predictions land, the board will appear here.

predictionSection.compactRowsShow: Compact rows show each fixture and pick status. Open a match to update the full prediction.

scoringExplanations.waitingForScoringDetail: Your prediction exists, but this match has not been scored yet.
scoringExplanations.finalScoreUnavailableDetail: We have the match marked as final, but the score is not available yet.
scoringExplanations.exactScoreDetail: You nailed the final score: {points} awarded.
scoringExplanations.correctOutcomeDetail: You predicted a {predictedOutcome}, and the match ended as {actualOutcome}.
scoringExplanations.wrongOutcomeDetail: You predicted a {predictedOutcome}, but the match ended as {actualOutcome}.

dashboardStrings.noUpcomingMatches: No upcoming World Cup matches open for prediction right now. New scored matches will appear above when results land.
dashboardStrings.noPredictionSubmitted: You did not submit a prediction for this match, so no points were awarded.
dashboardStrings.setExactWorldCupScore: Set the exact World Cup score.
dashboardStrings.matchFinalLocked: This match is final, so predictions are locked.
dashboardStrings.matchNoLongerOpen: This match is no longer open for predictions.
dashboardStrings.completeProfileToUnlock: Complete your profile to unlock the prediction form for this match.
dashboardStrings.theseAreFinishedMatches: These are finished matches you predicted since you last cleared this section.

scoringRules.title: How points work
scoringRules.description: Your ranking updates when final results are confirmed. Exact scores matter most, but correctly reading the match outcome still earns points.
scoringRules.exactScoreDetail: Predict both teams' final scores correctly to earn 3 points.
scoringRules.correctOutcomeDetail: Pick the right winner, or the draw, but miss the exact score to earn 1 point.
scoringRules.wrongOutcomeDetail: Miss the winner or draw and you earn 0 points for that match.

title.previewTheCard: Preview the card before you share it.

description.previewDescription: Preview your prediction, group standing, or performance summary with the current visual card treatment before you copy or share it.

errorMessages.invalidInput: Choose a valid prediction or group before generating a share card.
errorMessages.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again to generate share cards.
errorMessages.predictionNotFound: We could not find that saved prediction.
errorMessages.performanceNotReady: Your performance summary is not ready yet.
errorMessages.groupForbidden: You need access to that group before sharing its standing.
errorMessages.groupNotReady: We could not find a ranking snapshot for that group yet.
errorMessages.createFailed: We could not generate the share card right now. Try again.

predictionForm.pickOneSaved: Pick one of your saved predictions and turn it into a clean share card.
predictionForm.usesYourSavedData: Uses your saved prediction data and the current visual card background.

performanceForm.showYourPoints: Show your points, exact picks, and current position in one card.

groupForm.chooseGroup: Choose one of your groups and turn the current table into a clean share card.
groupForm.showGroupInfo: Show your group name, current place, points, and predictions in one card.

templates.progressNotReady: Your tournament progress will show up here once your ranking is ready.
templates.groupLiveMessage: Your group is live with {points} points and {count} predictions on the board.
templates.pickGroupToPreview: Pick one of your groups to preview the current table before sharing it.

fallback.pickPredictionToEnable: Pick a saved prediction to enable copy/share.
fallback.generateCardToEnable: Generate the group card to enable copy/share.

subtitle.personalizeCompetition: We use country and favorite team to personalize your competition view.

errorMessages.invalidInput: Please choose a country, team, and language.
errorMessages.updateFailed: We could not save your profile right now. Try again.

form.waitingForMatches: Waiting for active matches to publish teams.
form.lastStepBeforePredicting: This is the last step before predicting.

dashboardStrings.noUpcomingMatches: No upcoming World Cup matches open for prediction right now. New scored matches will appear above when results land.
dashboardStrings.noPredictionSubmitted: You did not submit a prediction for this match, so no points were awarded.
dashboardStrings.setExactWorldCupScore: Set the exact World Cup score.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Review active World Cup fixtures, save predictions, and track your latest tournament results.

share.title: Share cards
share.description: Preview and share your football prediction snapshots, performance summaries, and private group standings.

onboarding.title: Complete profile
onboarding.description: Choose your country, language, and favorite team before joining the football prediction competition.

landing.title: WorldPredict — Social Football Prediction
landing.description: A social football prediction platform where fans compete with friends, track rankings, and share results without betting mechanics.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Create or join private football prediction groups and compete with your friends.

groupDetail.title: Group ranking
groupDetail.description: Track your private group leaderboard after confirmed football results land.

rankings.title: Rankings
rankings.description: Compare World Cup prediction points, exact picks, and standings across the active leaderboard.

errors.invalidInput: Use a short group name and a valid invite code.
errors.notFound: We could not find that invite code or group.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again to manage groups.
errors.createFailed: We could not create the group right now. Try again.
errors.joinFailed: We could not join the group right now. Try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

list.title: Compete with your private circle.
list.description: Create a group, copy the invite code, and bring your friends into your private circle.
list.secondaryDescription: Open each group to see the ranking, latest scored players, and your position after results land.
list.profileIncomplete: Finish onboarding first. Group actions stay visible, but disabled until your profile is complete.
list.shareInviteOrOpen: Share the invite code or open the private ranking.
list.noGroupsBody: Create one above to get your first invite code, or join a friend’s group to start together.

actions.createBody: Pick a name, get an invite code, and start your crew ranking.
actions.copyAfterCreation: You can copy the invite code after creation.
actions.joinBody: Paste the code from a friend and jump into their private leaderboard.
actions.alreadyJoined: Already joined? Opening the ranking is enough.

detail.description: Track your crew after every scored match. The board updates when confirmed results recalculate predictions.
detail.aloneTitle: You are alone in this group.
detail.inviteFriendsFromList: Invite friends from your groups list to turn this into a real competition.
detail.shareCodeWithFriends: Share the code with friends so the leaderboard starts moving.
detail.singleMemberSuffix: Rankings get interesting once friends join, predict, and results start moving the table.
detail.friendsCanJoin: Friends can join from the Groups page with this code.
detail.leaderPace: The current front-runner sets the pace for the group.
detail.latestScoringDescription: This shows the most recent player whose points changed after a scored result.
detail.positionNoEntry: Score your first prediction to enter this group ranking.
detail.positionLeading: You are leading this group. Don’t let up now.
detail.positionTied: You are tied with the leader. One exact result can break it.
detail.noRankingData: No ranking data yet. Invite a friend and come back after the first scores land.
detail.accessError: You need group access to view this ranking.
detail.loadError: We could not load this ranking right now.

rankings.title: World Cup ranking
rankings.description: Compare points, exact picks, and prediction volume across everyone playing this World Cup.
rankings.yourPlace: Your place in the World Cup board
rankings.showingTop: Showing the top {visible} players. Your standing stays visible above.
rankings.noGlobalData: No global ranking data yet. Once scores are recorded, positions will appear here.
rankings.noSearchResults: No players match that search yet.
rankings.rowSummary: {exact} exact · {predictions, plural, one {# prediction} other {# predictions}}

profileEdit.title: Edit profile
profileEdit.mustPickNewTeam: Your saved favorite team is not in the current tournament. Please select a new one.
profileEdit.changeFavoriteTeam: Select a team if you want to change your favorite.

metadata.title: External results admin
metadata.description: Review staged football results from external providers before confirming or discarding them.

externalResults.permissionNotice: This screen requires the {permission} permission. Review provider-staged scores carefully before confirming or discarding them, because confirmation finalizes the linked internal match and updates the ranking tables.

errors.accessDenied: You need the matches:finalize permission to review or confirm staged results.
errors.alreadyProcessed: This staged result was already confirmed or discarded.
errors.badRequest: We could not process that staged result.
errors.notFound: We could not find that staged result.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired or is missing the required admin permission.
errors.unlinkedMatch: This staged result is not linked to an internal match yet.
errors.listLoadFailed: We could not load staged results right now.

success.confirmed: Staged result confirmed and the linked match was finalized.
success.discarded: Staged result discarded without touching the linked match.

actions.tournamentSelectorHint: Choose Liga Argentina before importing with the lpf-web provider; if World Cup 2026 remains selected, this provider has no config for that slug.

syncSection.title: Recent provider runs
syncSection.subtitle: Check the latest import/results runs before debugging staged results. If a run failed or never completed, the review queue can look empty even when matches exist.

diagnosticsSection.title: Matches visible to users
diagnosticsSection.subtitle: This shows every active-tournament match and whether the provider mapping/result exists. If a dashboard match is missing here as a pending result, look at its external ref and latest result state first.
diagnosticsSection.emptyState: No active-tournament matches found for diagnostics.

resultCard.notLinked: Not linked yet — confirm only after the internal match exists.
